creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 191086
Screenshot of Google Photos after an upload

56.0.4_4 (a little outdated – 56.0.4.20_2 is not yet in Area 51). 

Waterfox in safe mode, FreeBSD-CURRENT. 

At <https://photos.google.com/> after any upload: 

- the UI of Google Photos becomes unresponsive (no response to clicks)

- the scrollbar becomes unresponsive. 

In the attached screenshot, for example, nothing happens when I click on the 'X' that would normally close the upload confirmation dialogue.
